category_sources: official GitHub README says Enca guesses and converts text-file encodings and includes libenca plus a command-line frontend.
display_name_sources: official GitHub README title uses Enca.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official software page; official GitHub README and repository include README, FAQ, man, and devel-docs directories.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Project-OSS-Revival/enca, so repo is not re-determined.
tags_sources: official GitHub README describes Enca as an encoding detection library and command-line charset conversion frontend.
